Container.Name: FarFetched
Container.Overview: FarFetched — a self-hosted browser and paced downloader for free 3D models from Printables, plus a local library organizer for files you have already downloaded from other sources. Browse by category, queue models, and a background worker saves them to disk at a polite pace. Open the WebUI and set your Printables token under Settings.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the FarFetched web interface

Config.Name: Downloads (models)
Config.Description: Host folder where downloaded models are saved (per-source subfolders: printables/, stlflix/, ...)

Config.Name: App Data (token, db, logs)
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the Printables token, the SQLite queue, and logs. Keep this stable across updates.

Config.Name: Download Dir (in container)
Config.Description: Where the worker writes inside the container. Leave as /downloads.

Config.Name: Pace (seconds between files)
Config.Description: Seconds the worker waits between file downloads. 120 is polite; lower at your own risk.
